description: Real capture (2026-07-09, SDK 0.3.206). A run_in_background Bash task (sleep 10) completes while the session is BUSY on a second foreground turn (sleep 15) — the busy-path terminal signal (task_updated{status:completed}) arrives mid-turn, no premature idle for the bg task at completion time. Includes background_tasks_changed snapshots. Guards busy-path clear + no dangling session_waiting_background at final idle.
